text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the final race of the Classic Triple
Crown, the Kikuka Sho, Seiun Sky is just as
carefree as ever. She stares up at the peaceful
blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, the other members of the big
three, her rivals Special Week and King Halo, are
full of fighting spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the traps Seiun Sky has set cannot fail. Ready
to outwit her opponents, she heads to the
racecourse.
